title: Please create the ability to make Folders in the "files / attachments" section.
excerpt: In tracking a large project, often many many revisions of recaps, quotes, and drawings are imported. The ability to create new folders within the files area will greatly help with info organization and retrieval.

posts.author: TSCJDK (Jeffrey Krus)
posts.cookedHtml: In tracking a large project, often many many revisions of recaps, quotes, and drawings are imported. The ability to create new folders within the files area will greatly help with info organization and retrieval.
